title: The Bounty Game Draws Fighters In
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the bounty game draws fighters in, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #4 as doflamingo's officers defend the palace and the factory while the allies split into fights across the trapped kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The rebellion picks up against the "Most terrible game"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What have you come here for?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Perhaps you've brought me "straw hat's" head?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Why did you send Derringer to come after me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Was that really by your order!?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: ...Fufufu!! You really get right to it, don't you ...bellamy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You and I desire different things...our goals have not been the same...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: you just had to become a "pirate."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: -But me... I was different ...anything was fine by me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As long as I was able...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We've got to hurry on Ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey, who is this I'm seeing right now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: How many heads have you severed?! 100? 1000?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: They were all enemies of war to be executed, weren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Be on the look out for the officers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Hyahoho too late!! I'll be going ahead to the third floor now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: deploy- ing your troops to the wall is useless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Why are these weird rocks swelling up?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I wouldn't touch those if I were you. "Landmine punk".

summary: The Bounty Game Draws Fighters In develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
